'''âf-s-j''' ('''fasaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whetstone|whetstone]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-s-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whetstone|whetstone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-s-j
|-
! Lemma
| fasaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fasajithi|fasajithi]] || [[word:fasajiji|fasajiji]] || [[word:fasajishi|fasajishi]] || [[word:fasaji|fasaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fasajuthuth|fasajuthuth]] || [[word:fasajujuj|fasajujuj]] || [[word:fasajushush|fasajushush]] || [[word:fasaj|fasaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fasajuthu|fasajuthu]] || [[word:fasajuju|fasajuju]] || [[word:fasajushu|fasajushu]] || [[word:fasaju|fasaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fasajufuth|fasajufuth]] || [[word:fasajufuj|fasajufuj]] || [[word:fasajufush|fasajufush]] || [[word:fasajuf|fasajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fasajethe|fasajethe]] || [[word:fasajeje|fasajeje]] || [[word:fasajeshe|fasajeshe]] || [[word:fasaje|fasaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fasajothoth|fasajothoth]] || [[word:fasajojoj|fasajojoj]] || [[word:fasajoshosh|fasajoshosh]] || [[word:fasaj|fasaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fasajotho|fasajotho]] || [[word:fasajojo|fasajojo]] || [[word:fasajosho|fasajosho]] || [[word:fasajo|fasajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fasajofoth|fasajofoth]] || [[word:fasajofoj|fasajofoj]] || [[word:fasajofosh|fasajofosh]] || [[word:fasajof|fasajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fasajĂŠthĂŠ|fasajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:fasajĂŠjĂŠ|fasajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:fasajĂŠshĂŠ|fasajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:fasajĂŠ|fasajĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fasajathath|fasajathath]] || [[word:fasajajaj|fasajajaj]] || [[word:fasajashash|fasajashash]] || [[word:fasaj|fasaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fasajatha|fasajatha]] || [[word:fasajaja|fasajaja]] || [[word:fasajasha|fasajasha]] || [[word:fasaja|fasaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fasajafath|fasajafath]] || [[word:fasajafaj|fasajafaj]] || [[word:fasajafash|fasajafash]] || [[word:fasajaf|fasajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:fasajasha|fasajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gofasajasha|gofasajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokifasajasha|gokifasajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:fasajnĂŒsha|fasajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gofasajnknĂŒsha|gofasajnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokifasajnĂŒsha|gokifasajnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fasajshĂ«sha|fasajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofasajnkshĂ«sha|gofasajnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifasajshĂ«sha|gokifasajshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fasajrosha|fasajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofasajnkrosha|gofasajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifasajrosha|gokifasajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fasajmusha|fasajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofasajnkmusha|gofasajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifasajmusha|gokifasajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:fasajsherasha|fasajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gofasajnksherasha|gofasajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokifasajsherasha|gokifasajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:fasajngasha|fasajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gofasajnkngasha|gofasajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokifasajngasha|gokifasajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fasajyasha|fasajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofasajnkyasha|gofasajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokifasajyasha|gokifasajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:fasajyamasha|fasajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gofasajnkyamasha|gofasajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokifasajyamasha|gokifasajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:fasajnĂŒshĂ«sha|fasajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofasajnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gofasajnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifasajnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokifasajnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fasajnĂŒrosha|fasajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofasajnknĂŒrosha|gofasajnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifasajnĂŒrosha|gokifasajnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fasajnĂŒmusha|fasajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofasajnknĂŒmusha|gofasajnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifasajnĂŒmusha|gokifasajnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:fasajshĂ«nĂŒsha|fasajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofasajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gofasajnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifasajshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokifasajshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fasajshĂ«rosha|fasajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofasajnkshĂ«rosha|gofasajnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifasajshĂ«rosha|gokifasajshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fasajshĂ«musha|fasajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofasajnkshĂ«musha|gofasajnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifasajshĂ«musha|gokifasajshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:fasajronĂŒsha|fasajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofasajnkronĂŒsha|gofasajnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifasajronĂŒsha|gokifasajronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:fasajroshĂ«sha|fasajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofasajnkroshĂ«sha|gofasajnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifasajroshĂ«sha|gokifasajroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fasajromusha|fasajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofasajnkromusha|gofasajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifasajromusha|gokifasajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:fasajmunĂŒsha|fasajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofasajnkmunĂŒsha|gofasajnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifasajmunĂŒsha|gokifasajmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:fasajmushĂ«sha|fasajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofasajnkmushĂ«sha|gofasajnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifasajmushĂ«sha|gokifasajmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fasajmurosha|fasajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofasajnkmurosha|gofasajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifasajmurosha|gokifasajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:fasaj|fasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:fĂŠsĂŠj|fĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hofasaj|hofasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hofĂŠsĂŠj|hofĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofasaj|hohofasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofĂŠsĂŠj|hohofĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒfasaj|nĂŒfasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒfĂŠsĂŠj|nĂŒfĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfasaj|nĂŒnĂŒfasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠsĂŠj|nĂŒnĂŒfĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻfasaj|nĂŻfasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻfĂŠsĂŠj|nĂŻfĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfasaj|nĂŻnĂŻfasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠsĂŠj|nĂŻnĂŻfĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lufasaj|lufasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lufĂŠsĂŠj|lufĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufasaj|lulufasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufĂŠsĂŠj|lulufĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lifasaj|lifasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lifĂŠsĂŠj|lifĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifasaj|lilifasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifĂŠsĂŠj|lilifĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kofasaj|kofasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kofĂŠsĂŠj|kofĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofasaj|kokofasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofĂŠsĂŠj|kokofĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kefasaj|kefasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kefĂŠsĂŠj|kefĂŠsĂŠj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefasaj|kekefasaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefĂŠsĂŠj|kekefĂŠsĂŠj]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
